autor: the ghosts I can’t see but I know stick around. Some I know are good. Others I know are bad. The first bring me nostalgic comfort while the latter instill unease.
explicacao: Citação de the ghosts I can’t see but I know stick around. Some I know are good. Others I know are bad. The first bring me nostalgic comfort while the latter instill unease. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I write for ghosts” articula reflexao, donna-lynn-hope, write em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
